min-viewport.description: Lower anchor viewport for fluid type sizing.

max-viewport.description: Upper anchor viewport for fluid type sizing.

min-base.description: Base (md) font size at the min viewport.

max-base.description: Base (md) font size at the max viewport.

min-ratio.description: Type scale ratio at the min viewport (minor third).

max-ratio.description: Type scale ratio at the max viewport (major third).
